code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut ti = 0
while ti < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(ti)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
  ti = ti + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < nums.len()
  let x = match nums.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut j = 0
  while j < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, v)
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
  end
  sorted = new_sorted
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(w)
    w
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
